hooks.command: $data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.ts$' -and $f -notmatch 'generated') { Set-Location $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR; pnpm eslint --fix $f; if ($f -match '\.spec\.ts$') { pnpm jest $f --passWithNoTests } }
echo '-- Dev log: did you update logs/dev.log?'
